title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.310 - Relatives of curators not to be employed
text:
172.310.  Relatives of curators not to be employed. — No person who is related by blood or marriage to any member of the board of curators of the university shall be appointed to any position in the university as officer, member of any faculty or employee.
(RSMo 1939 § 10793) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9636; 1919 § 11533; 1909 § 11107
